Imports

common

Procs

proc createResponse(api: OpenAiApi; model: string; input: string;
                    instructions: string = ""): OpenAiResponse {.
    ...raises: [JsonError, ValueError, ZippyError, CatchableError, OpenAiError],
    tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Create a simple text response using the Responses API. Source   Edit   
proc createResponse(api: OpenAiApi; req: CreateResponseReq): OpenAiResponse {.
    ...raises: [JsonError, ValueError, ZippyError, CatchableError, OpenAiError],
    tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Create a model response using the new Responses API. This is OpenAI's newer, more advanced API that supports multiple input types, built-in tools, and more sophisticated reasoning. Source   Edit   
proc createResponseWithTools(api: OpenAiApi; req: var CreateResponseReq;
                             tools: ResponseToolsTable;
                             callback: ResponseCallback = nil;
                             usePreviousResponseId: bool = true): OpenAiResponse {....raises: [
    KeyError, ZippyError, CatchableError, OpenAiError, JsonError, ValueError,
    Exception, IOError, OSError, JsonParsingError],
    tags: [RootEffect, TimeEffect, ReadIOEffect, WriteIOEffect], forbids: [].}
Create a response with tool calling, similar to createChatCompletionWithTools. Handles tool execution loop automatically with async status polling. usePreviousResponseId can be used to turn the feature off for servers that don't support it, like llama.cpp. The req parameter is mutated to include the full conversation history. Source   Edit   
proc deleteResponse(api: OpenAiApi; responseId: string): DeleteResponse {.
    ...raises: [ZippyError, CatchableError, OpenAiError, JsonError, ValueError],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Delete a model response by ID. Source   Edit   
proc getResponse(api: OpenAiApi; responseId: string): OpenAiResponse {.
    ...raises: [ZippyError, CatchableError, OpenAiError, JsonError, ValueError],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Get a model response by ID. Source   Edit   
proc nextResponseChunk(s: OpenAIResponseStream): Option[JsonNode] {....raises: [],
    tags: [ReadIOEffect, WriteIOEffect], forbids: [].}
Get the next chunk from a streaming response. Returns the parsed JSON chunk or none when stream ends. Source   Edit   
proc streamGetResponse(api: OpenAiApi; responseId: string): OpenAIResponseStream {.
    ...raises: [CatchableError, OpenAiError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Stream a model response by ID. Source   Edit   
proc streamResponse(api: OpenAiApi; req: CreateResponseReq): OpenAIResponseStream {.
    ...raises: [JsonError, ValueError, CatchableError, OpenAiError],
    tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Stream a response using the Responses API. Source   Edit
